data.name: Forbidden Dojo
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a thrilling and seductive adventure in Forbidden Dojo, an immersive adult visual novel that will captivate your senses and immerse you in a world of ancient beauty and sensual mystery. Step into the shoes of the protagonist as you navigate a world of magic, martial arts, and forbidden desires.



When a mysterious stranger knocks on your door, little do you know that your life is about to take an unexpected turn. With immense potential lying dormant within you, she transports you through a mystical portal to an enchanting world, where you find yourself in the tranquil courtyard of a martial arts dojo. Here, you encounter Akiko, the owner of a mesmerizing dojo, who welcomes you to stay and trains you in the ways of martial arts.



However, the tranquil atmosphere is disrupted when Sayuri, another enigmatic woman, appears with unwholesome intentions. As tensions rise between the two women, you find yourself entangled in their conflict. Amidst the chaos, a magical revelation ignites within you, leading you on a path to harness your newfound powers. As you journey through this extraordinary world, you'll face choices that shape your destiny. Will you pursue a deep bond with Akiko, exploring the depths of passion and love? Or will you yield to the allure of Sayuri's magical teachings, and embrace desires beyond imagination?



Navigate a world filled with dangerous encounters, intense martial arts battles, and steamy rendezvous. Your decisions shape the story and determine its outcome. Will you succumb to the allure of darkness, forging an unholy alliance? Or will you stand against evil, fighting alongside your chosen partner to protect what you hold dear?

data.short_description: Unleash your potential and explore a world of magic, martial arts, and seductive encounters in the immersive adult visual novel, Forbidden Dojo. Make choices, harness your powers, and forge intimate relationships as you face a dark evil. Your decisions shape the fate of this captivating realm.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2100 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2100 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2100 MB 可用空間
